label: Thing filter
description: Defines which ThingDefs are allowed or disallowed based on categories, trade tags, quality, hit points, comps, and other criteria. Used for ingredient filters, storage settings, and trade restrictions.

overrideRootDef.label: Override root def
overrideRootDef.description: ThingCategoryDef used as the root of the category tree shown in the filter UI, replacing the global root.

onlySpecialFilters.label: Only special filters
onlySpecialFilters.description: When true, the filter allows only things matched by active special filters, ignoring category and thingDef lists.

allowedHitPointsPercents.label: Allowed hit points percents
allowedHitPointsPercents.description: Hit-point fraction range (0-1) a thing must fall within to be allowed by this filter.

allowedMentalBreakChance.label: Allowed mental break chance
allowedMentalBreakChance.description: Mental break chance range (0-1) a pawn must fall within to be accepted by this filter.

allowedHitPointsConfigurable.label: Allowed hit points configurable
allowedHitPointsConfigurable.description: Whether the player can adjust the allowed hit-point range in the storage UI.

allowedQualities.label: Allowed qualities
allowedQualities.description: Quality range a thing must fall within to be allowed. Serialized as min~max quality category names.

allowedQualitiesConfigurable.label: Allowed qualities configurable
allowedQualitiesConfigurable.description: Whether the player can adjust the allowed quality range in the storage UI.

customSummary.label: Custom summary
customSummary.description: Override display text for this filter in the UI, replacing the auto-generated ingredient summary.

thingDefs.label: Thing defs
thingDefs.description: Explicit list of ThingDefs that are allowed by this filter.

categories.label: Categories
categories.description: ThingCategoryDef names whose members are allowed by this filter.

tradeTagsToAllow.label: Trade tags to allow
tradeTagsToAllow.description: Trade tag strings. Things carrying any of these tags are explicitly allowed.

tradeTagsToDisallow.label: Trade tags to disallow
tradeTagsToDisallow.description: Trade tag strings. Things carrying any of these tags are explicitly disallowed.

thingSetMakerTagsToAllow.label: Thing set maker tags to allow
thingSetMakerTagsToAllow.description: ThingSetMaker tag strings. Things carrying any of these tags are explicitly allowed.

thingSetMakerTagsToDisallow.label: Thing set maker tags to disallow
thingSetMakerTagsToDisallow.description: ThingSetMaker tag strings. Things carrying any of these tags are explicitly disallowed.

disallowedCategories.label: Disallowed categories
disallowedCategories.description: ThingCategoryDef names whose members are explicitly disallowed even if matched by other allow rules.

specialFiltersToAllow.label: Special filters to allow
specialFiltersToAllow.description: SpecialThingFilterDef names to activate in allow mode.

specialFiltersToDisallow.label: Special filters to disallow
specialFiltersToDisallow.description: SpecialThingFilterDef names to activate in disallow mode.

stuffCategoriesToAllow.label: Stuff categories to allow
stuffCategoriesToAllow.description: StuffCategoryDef references. Things belonging to these stuff categories are allowed.

allowAllWhoCanMake.label: Allow all who can make
allowAllWhoCanMake.description: ThingDef references. All things that can be made from any listed ThingDef are allowed.

disallowWorsePreferability.label: Disallow worse preferability
disallowWorsePreferability.description: Disallows things with a FoodPreferability value worse than this threshold.

disallowInedibleByHuman.label: Disallow inedible by human
disallowInedibleByHuman.description: When true, things that humans cannot eat are disallowed.

disallowDoesntProduceMeat.label: Disallow doesn't produce meat
disallowDoesntProduceMeat.description: When true, things that do not produce meat when butchered are disallowed.

disallowMedicalDrugs.label: Disallow medical drugs
disallowMedicalDrugs.description: When true, medical drugs are disallowed.

disallowNotEverStorable.label: Disallow not ever storable
disallowNotEverStorable.description: When true, things that can never be stored in a stockpile zone are disallowed.

allowWithComp.label: Allow with comp
allowWithComp.description: C# ThingComp type name. Things carrying this comp are explicitly allowed.

disallowWithComp.label: Disallow with comp
disallowWithComp.description: C# ThingComp type name. Things carrying this comp are explicitly disallowed.

disallowCheaperThan.label: Disallow cheaper than
disallowCheaperThan.description: Disallows things with a base market value below this threshold.

disallowedThingDefs.label: Disallowed thing defs
disallowedThingDefs.description: Explicit list of ThingDefs that are disallowed even if matched by other allow rules.
